text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Question! Why is it that my bangs 
come together so flawlessly?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A. Because I'm a genius! 
B. To show off my beautiful face! 
C. A blessing from above!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The correct answer is… all of the above!! As a consolation prize, I bless you with a smile from me!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead! Take it all in!!
Bask in the joy my face brings!!
